name: s-and-p-500-companies
title: S&P 500 Companies
description: List of companies currently in the S&P 500 index (Standard and Poor's 500), a free-float, capitalisation-weighted index of the 500 largest publicly listed US stocks by market cap. Includes ticker symbol, company name, GICS sector and sub-industry, headquarters location, date added to the index, SEC CIK number, and founding year. Data is sourced from Wikipedia and updated daily.

licenses.name: ODC-PDDL-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and License v1.0

views.name: sector-composition
views.title: S&P 500 Companies by Sector
views.description: Number of companies in the S&P 500 index by GICS sector. Industrials and Financials each have the most constituents (~75–80), while Energy and Communication Services have the fewest. Note that sector weights by market cap differ significantly — Information Technology dominates market cap despite ranking third by count.

resources.name: sector-counts
resources.description: Aggregated count of S&P 500 constituent companies by GICS sector, derived from the constituents resource. The total may exceed 500 because a small number of companies have multiple share classes listed in the index.

fields.name: sector
fields.description: GICS (Global Industry Classification Standard) sector name

resources.name: constituents
resources.description: Full list of S&P 500 constituent companies as sourced from Wikipedia. Each row represents one listed security (ticker symbol). A small number of companies appear twice with different symbols due to multiple share classes.

fields.name: Symbol
fields.description: Stock ticker symbol as listed on the exchange

fields.name: Security
fields.description: Company name as listed in the index

fields.name: GICS Sector
fields.description: GICS (Global Industry Classification Standard) sector to which the company belongs

fields.name: GICS Sub-Industry
fields.description: GICS sub-industry classification, a finer-grained grouping within the sector

fields.name: Headquarters Location
fields.description: City and state (or country) where the company's headquarters is located

fields.name: Date added
fields.description: Date the company was added to the S&P 500 index, in YYYY-MM-DD format

fields.name: CIK
fields.description: SEC Central Index Key — the unique identifier assigned by the US Securities and Exchange Commission

fields.name: Founded
fields.description: Year the company was founded. Some entries include a parenthetical note, e.g. '2013 (1888)', indicating the year of the current legal entity followed by the predecessor organisation's founding year
